COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR (TRANSACTION ID # 17030069) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALDAPE, RAUL

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF RAUL ALDAPE MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO LABOR CODE 98.2(K) AND CCP 685.040 IS GRANTED IN LARGE PART. MR. ALDAPE IS AWARDED ATTORNEY'S FEES OF $2,940 AND EXPENSES OF $157. NO OPPOSITION FILED. $450 IS AN EXCESSIVE HOURLY RATE FOR THE WORK PERFORMED AND THE AMOUNT AT ISSUE. $300 PER HOUR IS THE MAXIMUM HOURLY RATE THAT IS REASONABLE FOR THIS WORK. $300 X 9.8 HOURS IS $2,940. THE EXPENSES SOUGHT ARE RECOVERABLE IN FULL. ORDER AND FIRST AMENDED JUDGMENT SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: FELICIA GREEN; COURT REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR NO. 8189, EMAIL: CKAREN@SFTC.ORG; DEPT. 302.

calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Oct-11-2017 Discharged

MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES
Off Calendar Mar-20-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF RAUL ALDAPE MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS pursuant to Labor Code 98.2(k) and CCP 685.040 is granted in large part. Mr. Aldape is awarded attorney's fees of $2,940 and expenses of $157. No opposition filed. $450 is an excessive hourly rate for the work performed and the amount at issue. $300 per hour is the maximum hourly rate that is reasonable for this work. $300 x 9.8 hours is $2,940. The expenses sought are recoverable in full. Order and First Amended Judgment signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org; Dept. 302.
